PMCRO Docs
Table of Contents

API Reference

Generated from XML doc comments via DocFX 2.78.5 · .NET 10

The API reference is generated from the XML documentation comments in the source. Every public type opens with an I AM identity declaration. Every method carries Law Anchors for the constraints it enforces.

The API reference covers the following namespaces:

Namespace What it contains
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models IntentEnvelope, CycleModels, SeedIntentRequest
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Skills FederationBoardSkill, OrchestratorSkill, PlannerSkill, MakerSkill, CheckerSkill, ReflectorSkill
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Workflows PmcroWorkflow, phase Executors
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp IMcpToolExecutor, IMcpClientRegistry, McpToolExecutor
ProjectName.ServiceDefaults PmcroSkillsProvider, AIExtensions, IHasInstructions

Note: The api/ directory is generated by docfx metadata. Run docfx metadata docfx.json from the project root to regenerate after source changes. Never hand-edit files in api/ — edit source XML comments and regenerate (DFX-001).
